scenarios.name: ESG Regulatory Tightening
scenarios.description: New environmental regulations threaten to significantly increase operational costs and limit extraction permits. The energy company must balance compliance, profitability, and stakeholder expectations.

customization.context: Navigating energy transition while maintaining profitability
Leading ESG strategy and environmental compliance
Managing field operations and extraction efficiency
Modeling compliance costs and capital requirements
Advising on regulatory compliance and legal exposure

round_structure: Regulatory landscape briefing: New requirements overview
Compliance cost assessment: Financial impact modeling
Operational impact analysis: Field operations constraints
Technology solutions: Carbon capture and efficiency improvements
Asset portfolio review: Stranded asset risk assessment
Stakeholder mapping: Investor and community expectations
Strategic options: Compliance vs. transformation paths

required: Full text of new environmental regulations
Current emissions baseline and compliance status
optional: Peer company ESG commitments and actions

environment_config.decision_mechanism: Board approval for major capital commitments
environment_config.escalation_trigger: Regulatory violation risks trigger emergency review

scenarios.name: Energy Transition Strategy
scenarios.description: With accelerating global energy transition, the oil & gas company must decide how aggressively to pivot toward renewables while managing legacy hydrocarbon assets.

customization.context: Building renewable energy and low-carbon businesses
Balancing dividend commitments with transformation investment
Pushing for faster decarbonization and transition

round_structure: Market outlook: Energy transition scenarios and timing
Portfolio assessment: Core vs. non-core asset classification
Renewable opportunities: Market entry options analysis
Capital allocation: Traditional vs. new energy investment split
Technology partnerships: Collaboration and acquisition targets
Talent and capabilities: Organizational transformation needs

environment_config.escalation_trigger: Major asset impairment or opportunity triggers review
environment_config.coalition_dynamics: Traditional energy vs. new energy business tensions
